=== Standard Library Function Tests ===

String length: 8
strcmp result: 0
strlen result: 12
memcpy result: 0x5a
memcmp result: 1
Value: 42, Name: TestName
printf return: 26
scanf result: -1090766844
fopen result: 42
fread/write result: 42
malloc/free result: 90
memset result: 0
strchr/strstr result: 15
=== System Call Tests ===

syscall result: 42
stat result: 42
